prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985/211/双一流， 软科主榜连续多年稳居第1名，全国顶尖学府，报考热度始终处于最高梯队；2026年声誉评价偏负面（中性/混合为主），主要涉及学校管理、校园安全等一般性 舆情；抖音热度总排名第2（高热），短视频曝光量极大，持续吸引高分段考生关注；历史投档异常信号为低关注，未见明显断档；清华大学拥有A+学科20余个 ，涵盖计算机、机械、材料、土木、建筑、电气、电子、生物医学工程、管理科学、法学、马克思主义理论等，学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等清华强势工科专业持续高热推荐，工科报考热度不减；本省2026年考生总数约48000人（不确定），较2025年物理类30457人明显增加 ，竞争加剧；清华大学位于北京，青海省属西部省份，招生占比极小（约0.004），跨省报考意愿受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类计划大幅扩招（13→19人，扩招约46%）、本省考生总数增加、学校声誉平稳且抖音高热持续吸引顶尖生源等因素，在2025年基准位次21名基础上，扩 招带来的位次后移效应（位次数字增大）与竞争加剧效应相互对冲，但扩招幅度较大，预计位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约23名，区间21–25名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for science subjects was approximately 14 → 21 → (2023 missing) → 21. The ranking was better in 2021 (14th), stabilized around 21st from 2022 onward, with a baseline ranking of about 21 in recent 3 years; the science enrollment plan was 13 each year from 2021 to 2024; the 2026 physics category enrollment plan is 19, an increase of about 46% compared to 2024, a relatively large expansion. Based on supply-demand elasticity, the ranking number should increase (intensified competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985/211/Double First-Class, consistently ranked 1st in the Soft Science main ranking for many years, a top national institution, with application enthusiasm always at the highest tier; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (neutral/mixed), mainly involving general public opinion on school management, campus safety, etc.; Douyin popularity ranks 2nd overall (high heat), with massive short video exposure, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates; historical abnormal signals for admission are low attention, with no obvious gaps; Tsinghua University has over 20 A+ disciplines, covering computer science, mechanical engineering, materials, civil engineering, architecture, electrical engineering, electronics, biomedical engineering, management science, law, Marxist theory, etc., with top national disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other strong engineering majors at Tsinghua continue to be highly recommended, with engineering application enthusiasm undiminished; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 48,000 (uncertain), a significant increase from 30,457 in the physics category in 2025, intensifying competition; Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, Qinghai Province is a western province, with a very small enrollment share (about 0.004), and cross-province application willingness is limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion of the 2026 physics category enrollment plan (13→19, about 46% increase), the increase in total candidates in the province, stable school reputation, and sustained high Douyin heat attracting top students, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 21, the ranking-back effect (ranking number increase) from expansion and the competition intensification effect offset each other, but the expansion is relatively large, so the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 23, with a range of 21–25.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range (21–25), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 21), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Mathematics and Physics/Xinya/Clinical Medicine); if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 25), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 2 engineering experimental classes.
